title: Teen Patti
desc: A mathematician creates an equation that cracks a three-card poker game called Teen Patti.

title: Baazi
desc: An honest officer is framed for murder when he starts investigating a case. However, he manages to escape from prison and goes undercover as a woman to unravel the conspiracy.

title: Baazi
desc: An honest officer is framed for murder when he starts investigating a case.

title: Aarzoo
desc: After her fiance, Vijay is killed in a crash, a pregnant Pooja agrees to marry Amar, her childhood friend. However, her life takes yet another turn when Vijay returns to her life.

title: Aarzoo
desc: After her fiance Vijay's death, Pooja marries Amar and moves on but Vijay returns.

title: Bol Radha Bol
desc: While Kishen enjoys village life and romance with Radha, a sinister doppelganger plots. Upon returning home, he'll discover his identity and life stolen by this malevolent impostor.

title: Bol Radha Bol
desc: Kishen returns love-struck from a trip and loses his everything to an evil look-alike.

title: Jigar
desc: Raju wants to take revenge and learns to fight after his sister is raped and killed.

title: Jigar
desc: Duryodhan, a wrestler, is Raju's friend, but due to a misunderstanding he rapes and kills Raju's sister. Raju later seeks Baba Thakur's help to train in fighting to avenge his sister's death.

title: Tirangaa
desc: Suryadev Singh and Shivajirao Waghle work together to track down a terrorist.

title: Paap Ki Aandhi
desc: A dangerous hoodlum seeks revenge against his brother-in-law for getting him arrested.

title: Company
desc: Mallik recruits Chandu and rises against Aslam.

title: Company
desc: Mallik and Chandu join hands to form a gang, displacing underworld don Aslam.

title: Moksha
desc: Vikram and Ritika decide to open a firm offering legal aid to the needy. However, things don't go as planned after she is murdered and he becomes the prime suspect.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
desc: Three orphan friends team up to avenge the killing of their fathers.

title: Salaami
desc: A young army cadet tries his best to expose a corrupt police officer.

title: Mawaali
desc: Things take a turn when an industrialist is murdered and Ramesh is arrested for the crime.

title: Satyam Shivam Sundaram
desc: Rajeev falls in love with a woman who hides the fact that half her face is disfigured.

title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
desc: A police officer and a former criminal join hands together to take down a notorious gangster.

title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
desc: Madhubala, a surrogate mother, falls in love with the father of the child.

title: Allah Rakha
desc: A driver's family is destroyed after he takes the blame for an accident.

title: Trimurti
desc: Kalyani fights to save her son Nandu after his arrest, asking Jagannath for mercy and his release, hoping fairness, hope, and relief will come soon.

title: Salaami
desc: Army cadet Vijay uncovers corruption, sparking a fierce battle with the police, led by the vengeful officer Gautam, threatening his career and family.

title: Sahibaan
desc: Sahibaan loves Gopi but Vijay a womanizer wants her. When she rejects him Vijay seeks to kill Gopi.
